codeline.highlight: gemm_mixed_small<((predo_trans_A) ? false : do_trans_A), ((predo_trans_B) ? false : do_trans_B), use_alpha, use_beta>::apply(C,AA,BB,alpha,beta);
gemm_mixed_large<((predo_trans_A) ? false : do_trans_A), ((predo_trans_B) ? false : do_trans_B), use_alpha, use_beta>::apply(C,AA,BB,alpha,beta);
